meta.title: Dashboard - VPN Command Center
meta.description: Secure VPN administration dashboard with real-time monitoring, analytics, and network management

title: VPN COMMAND CENTER
opsBaseline: Users, nodes, traffic, and geographic coverage

cabinet.title: CyberVPN Personal Cabinet
cabinet.subtitle: A customer-first control room for your plan, VPN readiness, traffic, wallet, rewards, notifications, and security posture.

sync.title: Backend sync state
sync.neverSynced: No backend snapshot has been loaded yet.

s2Actions.title: Plan, payment, and growth actions
s2Actions.description: Public-release actions stay in one place: trial, renewal, payment history, and growth codes appear here only when the backend/runtime flags allow them.

trialPlans.label: Trial and plans
trialPlans.description: Start trial, choose a plan, or renew access.

paymentHistory.label: Payments
paymentHistory.description: Review invoices, attempts, and wallet history.

growthHub.label: Referrals
growthHub.description: Copy referral links and review invite rewards.

codes.label: Promo and gifts
codes.description: Redeem promo, checkout, invite, and gift codes.

healthy.title: Healthy
healthy.description: Your account has an active service state and no urgent customer actions.

attention.title: Needs attention
attention.description: One or more account signals need review: provisioning, traffic, expiry, or notifications.

critical.title: Action required
critical.description: Your VPN access may be expired, blocked, or near a usage limit. Review the next actions before connecting.

actions.managePlanDescription: Renew, upgrade, or review active limits.
actions.getConfigDescription: Open servers and import connection profiles.
actions.finishProvisioningDescription: Provision the missing access channel or credential.
actions.reviewNotificationsDescription: Open action-required delivery and reward updates.
actions.startTrialDescription: Activate your eligible trial before choosing a plan.
actions.watchTrafficDescription: Check usage before the current period closes.
actions.inviteDescription: Share rewards and track pending payouts.

traffic.title: Traffic
traffic.empty: Usage snapshot is not loaded yet
traffic.unmetered: Current plan has no traffic cap

wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.empty: Wallet snapshot is not loaded yet

notifications.title: Inbox
notifications.empty: Notification counters are not loaded yet

readiness.title: Connection delivery state
readiness.description: This panel checks whether your subscription, provisioning profile, device credential, and access channel line up with the backend.

notifications.title: Latest account signals
notifications.description: Recent delivery, rewards, payment, and admin updates from the backend notification system.
notifications.empty: No visible customer notifications right now.
notifications.errorDescription: The dashboard is still usable. Retry the notification stream or continue to settings and payments.

items.cookieSession: Web auth uses httpOnly cookies; tokens are not exposed to browser JavaScript.
items.twoFactor: Enable or review two-factor authentication in settings.
items.antiPhishing: Set an anti-phishing code before trusting operational emails.
items.notifications: Keep critical delivery and payment notifications enabled.

stage1States.ariaLabel: Release access, payment, and provisioning states

active.title: Access active
active.description: Paid VPN access is active and ready for normal connection delivery.

trial_active.title: Trial active
trial_active.description: Trial access is active. Review the expiry date before the trial window closes.

grace.title: Grace period
grace.description: VPN access remains available during the 72-hour grace window. Renew manually before it closes.

expired.title: Access expired
expired.description: VPN access is expired or disabled. Renew the plan or contact support before connecting.

payment_pending.title: Payment pending
payment_pending.description: Payment is not final yet. Access will be issued after payment confirmation and reconciliation.

provisioning_pending.title: Provisioning pending
provisioning_pending.description: The plan exists, but VPN delivery is still preparing credentials or an access channel.

no_access.title: No access yet
no_access.description: No active entitlement is available. Start trial or choose a plan to request VPN access.

checking.title: Checking access
checking.description: The dashboard is loading the latest entitlement snapshot before showing the final access state.

paid.title: Payment accepted
paid.description: Billing state is settled for the current access window.

not_started.title: Payment not started
not_started.description: No live payment is attached to the current access state.

pending.title: Payment pending
pending.description: Provider confirmation is still pending. Keep this payment under review until it becomes final.

processing.title: Payment processing
processing.description: Provider processing is in progress. Do not retry the same checkout until the status is final.

failed.title: Payment failed
failed.description: Payment failed or was rejected. Use a new checkout or contact support if funds were reserved.

expired.title: Payment expired
expired.description: The payment window has expired. Create a new renewal or plan invoice.

refunded.title: Refund recorded
refunded.description: A refund is recorded for this billing state. Access may need manual support review.

reconciliation_required.title: Manual review required
reconciliation_required.description: Payment and access state need manual reconciliation. Support should resolve it within the S1 24-hour policy.

checking.title: Checking payment
checking.description: The dashboard is loading billing signals before showing the final payment state.

ready.title: VPN ready
ready.description: Remnawave delivery has a service identity, credential, profile, and access channel.

pending.title: Provisioning pending
pending.description: VPN credentials or delivery channel are not ready yet. Retry or wait for worker reconciliation.

retrying.title: Provisioning retrying
retrying.description: The backend is retrying VPN delivery. Contact support if this does not resolve quickly.

failed.title: Provisioning failed
failed.description: VPN delivery failed. Support must re-run provisioning or issue manual remediation.

remnawave_unavailable.title: Remnawave unavailable
remnawave_unavailable.description: The dashboard cannot reach the provisioning state. Retry before changing access or payment data.

reconciliation_required.title: Provisioning review required
reconciliation_required.description: Payment/access and VPN delivery disagree. Support must reconcile under the paid entitlement escalation policy.

not_required.title: Not required yet
not_required.description: Provisioning starts after trial activation or a final paid access decision.

checking.title: Checking provisioning
checking.description: The dashboard is loading VPN delivery signals before showing the final provisioning state.

meta.title: Support tickets - CyberVPN
meta.description: Create and track CyberVPN support tickets from the customer cabinet.

support.title: Support tickets
support.description: Create a support ticket, follow the conversation, reply to staff, and close or reopen your own case without leaving the cabinet.

sensitiveWarning.title: Do not send secrets
sensitiveWarning.description: Never include passwords, 2FA codes, full card numbers, CVV/CVC, seed phrases, raw QR codes, raw subscription URLs, or raw VPN config files.

form.title: Create ticket
form.messagePlaceholder: Describe what happened, what you expected, and any safe error text.
form.messageHelp: {count}/4000 characters. Keep diagnostics safe and redact private values.

list.title: My tickets
list.emptyDescription: Create a ticket when payment, access, setup, or account recovery needs help.

detail.emptyDescription: Ticket details and public replies appear here.
detail.noMessages: No public messages are attached to this ticket yet.
detail.closedDescription: Reopen the ticket if the issue returned or you need to add more information.

reply.label: Reply
reply.placeholder: Add a safe update for support.

errors.detail: This support ticket could not be loaded.
errors.create: Ticket creation failed. Please try again.
errors.close: Ticket close failed. Please try again.
errors.reopen: Ticket reopen failed. Please try again.
